Issues: The background elements (splatters, foliage, washes) are overly busy and distract from the main subject, which is meant to convey calmness. The environment clashes slightly with the serene, internalized mood of the figure.

The style is loose and relies heavily on expressive ink washes. While this can be appealing, inconsistent line weight and the overall messy nature of the ink splattering might be perceived as unfinished or sloppy, depending on the print medium.

The composition is safe but generic. The figure is centered, which is structurally sound, but the use of space around the subject could be more deliberate to enhance the meditative quality (e.g., using negative space more effectively).
